case_title: SKYLINK TV VS. INTERNATIONAL CHINESE AFFAIRS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINK TV REPRESENTED BY TSZ HO LUI ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL CHINESE AFFAIRS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,060.00 FILED BY SKYLINK TV AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL CHINESE AFFAIRS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINK TV
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $74.00 SERVED DEC-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL CHINESE AFFAIRS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINK TV

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKYLINK TV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL CHINESE AFFAIRS $1,860.00 PRINCIPAL, $124.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,984.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
